        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for flow keying, directionality, byte accounting.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import (\r\n    FlowTracker,\r\n    _normalize_key,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_key_normalization():\r\n    \"\"\"Same flow from either direction yields same key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80)\r\n    b = _normalize_key(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000)\r\n    assert a == b\r\n    assert a == ((\"192.168.1.1\", 80), (\"192.168.1.100\", 45000))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_flow_id_stable():\r\n    \"\"\"flow_id is deterministic for same 5-tuple and capture_file_id.\"\"\"\r\n    id1 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    id2 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id2\r\n    id3 = compute_flow_id(\"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, \"file.pcap\")\r\n    assert id1 == id3\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_byte_accounting():\r\n    \"\"\"FlowTracker counts bytes per direction correctly.\"\"\"\r\n    tracker = FlowTracker(capture_file_id=\"test\", flow_idle_timeout_sec=300)\r\n    # SYN from client (ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, ...)\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.0, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1000, 0x02))\r\n    # SYN-ACK from server\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.01, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"\", 2000, 0x12))\r\n    # ACK from client\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.02, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1001, 0x10))\r\n    # Data client -> server (10 bytes)\r\n    out = list(\r\n        tracker.ingest(\r\n            1000.03, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"1234567890\", 1001, 0x18\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # Data server -> client (5 bytes) + FIN server\r\n    out = list(\r\n        tracker.ingest(1000.04, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"hello\", 2001, 0x11)\r\n    )\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # FIN client\r\n    out = list(\r\n        tracker.ingest(1000.05, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1011, 0x11)\r\n    )\r\n    assert len(out) == 1\r\n    flow, segments = out[0]\r\n    assert flow.bytes_client_to_server == 10\r\n    assert flow.bytes_server_to_client == 5\r\n    assert flow.client_ip == \"192.168.1.100\"\r\n    assert flow.server_ip == \"192.168.1.1\"\r\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stable correlation IDs for flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport hashlib\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _canonical_endpoints(src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int) -> tuple[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically (ep = 'ip:port').\"\"\"\r\n    ep1 = f\"{src_ip}:{src_port}\"\r\n    ep2 = f\"{dst_ip}:{dst_port}\"\r\n    return (ep1, ep2) if ep1 <= ep2 else (ep2, ep1)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_flow_id(\r\n    src_ip: str,\r\n    src_port: int,\r\n    dst_ip: str,\r\n    dst_port: int,\r\n    protocol: int,\r\n    capture_file_id: str,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable hash of 5-tuple + capture file id. Deterministic across runs (same flow from either direction).\"\"\"\r\n    ep1, ep2 = _canonical_endpoints(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    canonical = f\"{ep1}|{ep2}|{protocol}|{capture_file_id}\"\r\n    return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id: str, transaction_index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/1.1: flow_id + sequential index.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_{transaction_index}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id: str, stream_id: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/2 or gRPC: flow_id + stream_id.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_s{stream_id}\"\r\n"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/1.1 request/response parsing from reassembled plaintext streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport re\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP_METHODS = (\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"PATCH\", \"DELETE\", \"HEAD\", \"OPTIONS\", \"CONNECT\", \"TRACE\")\r\nHTTP1_RESPONSE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^HTTP/1\\.[01]\\s+(\\d{3})\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\nREQUEST_LINE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^([A-Z]+)\\s+([^\\s]+)\\s+HTTP/1\\.[01]\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_request_starts(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return byte offsets where HTTP requests start (method token).\"\"\"\r\n    starts = []\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(data):\r\n        for method in HTTP_METHODS:\r\n            m = method.encode()\r\n            if data[i : i + len(m)] == m and (i == 0 or data[i - 1 : i] in b\"\\r\\n\"):\r\n                starts.append(i)\r\n                break\r\n        i += 1\r\n    return starts\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_response_starts(data: bytes) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return list of (offset, status_code) for HTTP response starts.\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    for m in HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.finditer(data):\r\n        results.append((m.start(), int(m.group(1))))\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _header_value(data: bytes, name: str) -> str | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Get first header value (case-insensitive). data must be bytes.\"\"\"\r\n    prefix = (name + \":\").encode().lower()\r\n    start = data.lower().find(prefix)\r\n    if start == -1:\r\n        return None\r\n    end = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\", start)\r\n    if end == -1:\r\n        end = len(data)\r\n    line = data[start + len(prefix) : end].strip().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    return line\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _split_headers_body(data: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (headers_bytes, body_bytes) after first \\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n.\"\"\"\r\n    idx = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\")\r\n    if idx == -1:\r\n        return (data, b\"\")\r\n    return (data[:idx], data[idx + 4 :])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _body_length_from_headers(headers: bytes) -> int | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Content-Length if present.\"\"\"\r\n    v = _header_value(headers, \"Content-Length\")\r\n    if v is None:\r\n        return None\r\n    try:\r\n        return int(v)\r\n    except ValueError:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_chunked(body: bytes) -> bytes:\r\n    \"\"\"Best-effort chunked decode; return concatenated body.\"\"\"\r\n    out = bytearray()\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(body):\r\n        line_end = body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i)\r\n        if line_end == -1:\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            size = int(body[i:line_end].strip().split(b\";\")[0], 16)\r\n        except ValueError:\r\n            break\r\n        i = line_end + 2\r\n        if size == 0:\r\n            break\r\n        if i + size <= len(body):\r\n            out.extend(body[i : i + size])\r\n        i += size\r\n        if body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i) == i:\r\n            i += 2\r\n    return bytes(out)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_request(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one request starting at start. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset) or None.\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    req_line = headers.split(b\"\\r\\n\")[0]\r\n    match = REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(req_line)\r\n    if not match:\r\n        return None\r\n    method = match.group(1).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    path = match.group(2).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    host = _header_value(headers, \"Host\")\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        te = _header_value(headers, \"Transfer-Encoding\") or \"\"\r\n        if \"chunked\" in te.lower():\r\n            # consume chunked body best-effort\r\n            raw_body = body\r\n            body = _parse_chunked(raw_body)\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4 + len(raw_body)  # approximate\r\n        else:\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return (\r\n        {\r\n            \"method\": method,\r\n            \"path\": path,\r\n            \"host\": host,\r\n            \"headers\": headers,\r\n            \"body\": body,\r\n            \"start\": start,\r\n            \"end\": end,\r\n        },\r\n        start,\r\n        end,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_response(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one response. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    status_match = HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.search(headers)\r\n    if not status_match:\r\n        return None\r\n    status_code = int(status_match.group(1))\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return (\r\n        {\"status_code\": status_code, \"headers\": headers, \"body\": body, \"start\": start, \"end\": end},\r\n        start,\r\n        end,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP1Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/1.1 request/response pairs from plaintext reassembled streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http1\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if not c2s_bytes and not s2c_bytes:\r\n            return False\r\n        data = c2s_bytes[:200] if c2s_bytes else s2c_bytes[:200]\r\n        if REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(data.lstrip()) or b\"HTTP/1.\" in data[:20]:\r\n            return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        req_starts = _find_request_starts(c2s_bytes)\r\n        resp_starts = _find_response_starts(s2c_bytes)\r\n        if not req_starts:\r\n            return []\r\n        req_idx = 0\r\n        resp_idx = 0\r\n        txn_index = 0\r\n        while req_idx < len(req_starts):\r\n            req_start = req_starts[req_idx]\r\n            result = _consume_request(c2s_bytes, req_start)\r\n            if not result:\r\n                req_idx += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            req_info, _r0, req_end = result\r\n            # Pair with next response\r\n            resp_start_offset = 0\r\n            resp_end_offset = 0\r\n            status_code = None\r\n            resp_result = None\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_start_offset, status_code = resp_starts[resp_idx]\r\n                resp_result = _consume_response(s2c_bytes, resp_start_offset)\r\n                if resp_result:\r\n                    _, _s0, resp_end_offset = resp_result\r\n                else:\r\n                    resp_end_offset = resp_start_offset\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_start, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = (\r\n                ts_at_offset(resp_start_offset, s2c_ts_map) if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) else None\r\n            )\r\n            end_ts = response_ts\r\n            if resp_result:\r\n                _, _, re = resp_result\r\n                end_ts = ts_at_offset(re, s2c_ts_map) or end_ts\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            request_bytes = req_end - req_start\r\n            response_bytes = (resp_end_offset - resp_start_offset) if resp_result else 0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id, txn_index)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http1\",\r\n                    method=req_info.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req_info.get(\"host\"),\r\n                    path=req_info.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=status_code,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=end_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=request_bytes,\r\n                    response_bytes=response_bytes,\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            txn_index += 1\r\n            req_idx += 1\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_idx += 1\r\n        return transactions\r\n"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/2 frame parsing and stream extraction using hyperframe and hpack.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nimport hpack\r\nfrom hyperframe.frame import Frame\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\nPREFACE_LEN = 24\r\nFRAME_HEADERS = 1\r\nFRAME_DATA = 0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_frames(data: bytes, base_offset: int = 0) -> list[tuple[int, int, Any, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 frames. Returns list of (stream_id, frame_type, frame_obj, byte_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 9 <= len(data):\r\n        try:\r\n            frame, length = Frame.parse_frame_header(data[offset : offset + 9])\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            break\r\n        if length > 0 and offset + 9 + length > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n        payload = data[offset + 9 : offset + 9 + length] if length > 0 else b\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            frame.parse_body(memoryview(payload))\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            offset += 9 + length\r\n            continue\r\n        stream_id = getattr(frame, \"stream_id\", 0)\r\n        results.append((stream_id, frame.type, frame, base_offset + offset))\r\n        offset += 9 + length\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _headers_to_dict(headers: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    return {k.lower(): v for k, v in headers}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _decode_header_block(block: bytes) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"HPACK-decode header block. Try with optional padding byte skip.\"\"\"\r\n    for start in (0, 1, 5, 6):\r\n        if start >= len(block):\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            decoder = hpack.Decoder()\r\n            headers = decoder.decode(block[start:])\r\n            return _headers_to_dict(headers)\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            continue\r\n    return {}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP2Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 streams from plaintext reassembled bytes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http2\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        return c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] == HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                if \":method\" in headers or \"method\" in headers:\r\n                    request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                        \"offset\": offset,\r\n                        \"method\": headers.get(\":method\") or headers.get(\"method\"),\r\n                        \"path\": headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\"),\r\n                        \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\") or headers.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                if \":status\" in headers or \"status\" in headers:\r\n                    try:\r\n                        response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": offset,\r\n                            \"status_code\": int(\r\n                                headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\")\r\n                            ),\r\n                        }\r\n                    except ValueError:\r\n                        pass\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http2\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"gRPC detection over HTTP/2: content-type application/grpc, :path, message framing.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport struct\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import (\r\n    FRAME_DATA,\r\n    FRAME_HEADERS,\r\n    HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE,\r\n    PREFACE_LEN,\r\n    _decode_header_block,\r\n    _parse_frames,\r\n)\r\n\r\nGRPC_CONTENT_TYPE = \"application/grpc\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_path(path: str) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract service and method from :path like /package.Service/Method.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path or not path.startswith(\"/\"):\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    path = path[1:]\r\n    if \"/\" not in path:\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    service, method = path.rsplit(\"/\", 1)\r\n    return (service or None, method or None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract message sizes from gRPC length-prefixed framing (1 byte compressed + 4 byte length).\"\"\"\r\n    sizes = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 5 <= len(data):\r\n        compressed = data[offset]\r\n        length = struct.unpack(\">I\", data[offset + 1 : offset + 5])[0]\r\n        sizes.append(length)\r\n        offset += 5 + length\r\n        if offset > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n    return sizes\r\n\r\n\r\nclass GrpcHandler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Detect gRPC over HTTP/2 and extract RPC identity and message sizes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"grpc\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] != HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE:\r\n            return False\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        for _sid, ft, frame, _off in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE in ct:\r\n                    return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        message_sizes_by_stream: dict[int, list[int]] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"method\": headers.get(\":method\"),\r\n                    \"path\": path,\r\n                    \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\"),\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                try:\r\n                    status_code = int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\"))\r\n                except ValueError:\r\n                    status_code = None\r\n                response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"status_code\": status_code,\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            service = req.get(\"service\") or resp.get(\"service\")\r\n            method = req.get(\"method\") or resp.get(\"method\")\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"grpc\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    grpc_service=service,\r\n                    grpc_method=method,\r\n                    message_sizes=message_sizes_by_stream.get(stream_id),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections.abc import Iterator\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int, int]\r\n# (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        payload = bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\"\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            payload,\r\n            tcp.seq,\r\n            tcp.flags,\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(\r\n    path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0\r\n) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags).\"\"\"\r\n    reader, fh = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            _, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n    finally:\r\n        fh.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Reconstruct TCP flows keyed by 5-tuple; track bytes, RTT, concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\nfrom collections.abc import Iterator\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _endpoint(ip: str, port: int) -> tuple[str, int]:\r\n    return (str(ip), int(port))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_key(\r\n    src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int\r\n) -> tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically for a unique flow key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _endpoint(src_ip, src_port)\r\n    b = _endpoint(dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    # Compare (ip, port) tuples: first by ip string, then by port int\r\n    if a[0] != b[0]:\r\n        return (a, b) if a[0] < b[0] else (b, a)\r\n    return (a, b) if a[1] <= b[1] else (b, a)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _FlowState:\r\n    \"\"\"Mutable state for one flow.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]\r\n    client_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    client_port: int = 0\r\n    server_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    server_port: int = 0\r\n    start_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    end_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    bytes_c2s: int = 0\r\n    bytes_s2c: int = 0\r\n    packets_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packets_s2c: int = 0\r\n    rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    syn_seen: bool = False\r\n    client_syn_ts: float | None = None  # ts of client's SYN for RTT\r\n    syn_ack_ts: float | None = None  # ts of server's SYN-ACK for RTT\r\n    initiator_seen: bool = False\r\n    segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]] = field(\r\n        default_factory=list\r\n    )  # ts, payload, \"c2s\"|\"s2c\", seq\r\n    last_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    fin_c2s: bool = False\r\n    fin_s2c: bool = False\r\n    rst: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def is_client_to_server(self, src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> bool:\r\n        return (src_ip, src_port) == (self.client_ip, self.client_port)\r\n\r\n    def add_packet(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        dst_ip: str,\r\n        dst_port: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        flags: int,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        TH_SYN = 0x02\r\n        TH_FIN = 0x01\r\n        TH_RST = 0x04\r\n\r\n        self.last_ts = ts\r\n        self.end_ts = ts\r\n        if not self.start_ts:\r\n            self.start_ts = ts\r\n\r\n        # Determine direction: SYN sender is always client\r\n        if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n            # First SYN: sender is client, receiver is server\r\n            c2s = True\r\n            self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n            self.client_port = src_port\r\n            self.server_ip = dst_ip\r\n            self.server_port = dst_port\r\n            self.initiator_seen = True\r\n        elif self.initiator_seen:\r\n            c2s = self.is_client_to_server(src_ip, src_port)\r\n        else:\r\n            # First packet was not SYN (mid-flow); other side is server\r\n            self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n            self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n            self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n            self.server_port = src_port\r\n            self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            c2s = False\r\n\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.client_syn_ts = ts\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts\r\n        if payload or (flags & TH_SYN):\r\n            self.segments.append((ts, payload, direction, tcp_seq))\r\n        if flags & TH_FIN:\r\n            if c2s:\r\n                self.fin_c2s = True\r\n            else:\r\n                self.fin_s2c = True\r\n        if flags & TH_RST:\r\n            self.rst = True\r\n\r\n    def is_closed(self) -> bool:\r\n        return self.rst or (self.fin_c2s and self.fin_s2c)\r\n\r\n    def duration_sec(self) -> float:\r\n        return self.end_ts - self.start_ts if self.start_ts else 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_ip_from_key(\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int\r\n) -> str:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[0]\r\n    return a[0]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_port_from_key(\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int\r\n) -> int:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[1]\r\n    return a[1]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _client_syn_ts(segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp of first c2s segment (client SYN or first data). Used for RTT.\"\"\"\r\n    for ts, _payload, direction, _seq in segments:\r\n        if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n            return ts\r\n    return None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FlowTracker:\r\n    \"\"\"Tracks active flows; yields Flow and segments when a flow closes or times out.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        capture_file_id: str,\r\n        flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = 60.0,\r\n        concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = 1.0,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        self.capture_file_id = capture_file_id\r\n        self.flow_idle_timeout_sec = flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        self.concurrency_bucket_seconds = concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._flows: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], _FlowState] = {}\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets: defaultdict[\r\n            float, set[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]]\r\n        ] = defaultdict(set)\r\n        self._current_ts: float = 0.0\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_flow(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]) -> _FlowState:\r\n        if key not in self._flows:\r\n            self._flows[key] = _FlowState(key=key)\r\n        return self._flows[key]\r\n\r\n    def _update_concurrency(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], ts: float) -> None:\r\n        bucket = (ts // self.concurrency_bucket_seconds) * self.concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets[bucket].add(key)\r\n\r\n    def _get_concurrency_timeline(self) -> list[tuple[float, int]]:\r\n        return [(t, len(s)) for t, s in sorted(self._concurrency_buckets.items())]\r\n\r\n    def _build_flow_model(\r\n        self,\r\n        state: _FlowState,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None,\r\n    ) -> Flow:\r\n        duration = state.duration_sec()\r\n        rtt_ms = None\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts is not None and state.client_syn_ts is not None:\r\n            rtt_ms = (state.syn_ack_ts - state.client_syn_ts) * 1000.0\r\n        return Flow(\r\n            flow_id=flow_id,\r\n            capture_file_id=self.capture_file_id,\r\n            src_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            src_port=state.client_port,\r\n            dst_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            dst_port=state.server_port,\r\n            protocol=6,\r\n            client_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            client_port=state.client_port,\r\n            server_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            server_port=state.server_port,\r\n            start_ts=state.start_ts,\r\n            end_ts=state.end_ts,\r\n            duration_sec=duration,\r\n            bytes_client_to_server=state.bytes_c2s,\r\n            bytes_server_to_client=state.bytes_s2c,\r\n            packet_count_c2s=state.packets_c2s,\r\n            packet_count_s2c=state.packets_s2c,\r\n            estimated_rtt_ms=rtt_ms,\r\n            concurrency_timeline=concurrency_timeline,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def ingest(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        dst_ip: str,\r\n        dst_port: int,\r\n        protocol: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        tcp_flags: int,\r\n    ) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Process one packet. Yields (Flow, segments) for each flow that just closed.\"\"\"\r\n        self._current_ts = ts\r\n        key = _normalize_key(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n        state = self._ensure_flow(key)\r\n\r\n        state.add_packet(ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n        self._update_concurrency(key, ts)\r\n\r\n        if state.is_closed():\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip,\r\n                state.client_port,\r\n                state.server_ip,\r\n                state.server_port,\r\n                protocol,\r\n                self.capture_file_id,\r\n            )\r\n            timeline = self._get_concurrency_timeline()\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, timeline)\r\n            segments = state.segments\r\n            del self._flows[key]\r\n            yield (flow, segments)\r\n\r\n    def flush_idle(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Close flows that have been idle past flow_idle_timeout_sec. Yields (Flow, segments).\"\"\"\r\n        to_remove = [\r\n            k\r\n            for k, s in self._flows.items()\r\n            if self._current_ts - s.last_ts >= self.flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        ]\r\n        for key in to_remove:\r\n            state = self._flows.pop(key)\r\n            if not state.initiator_seen:\r\n                continue\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip,\r\n                state.client_port,\r\n                state.server_ip,\r\n                state.server_port,\r\n                6,\r\n                self.capture_file_id,\r\n            )\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, self._get_concurrency_timeline())\r\n            yield (flow, state.segments)\r\n            del state\r\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"TCP stream reassembly with out-of-order and retransmission handling; bounded memory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\n\r\n# TCP sequence numbers are 32-bit and wrap; we use unsigned 32-bit arithmetic\r\nSEQ_MASK = 0xFFFFFFFF\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _seq_lt(a: int, b: int) -> bool:\r\n    \"\"\"True if a is strictly before b in sequence space (32-bit wrap: a before b when (a-b) is negative).\"\"\"\r\n    if a == b:\r\n        return False\r\n    return ((a - b) & SEQ_MASK) > 0x80000000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _seq_le(a: int, b: int) -> bool:\r\n    return a == b or _seq_lt(a, b)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _DirState:\r\n    \"\"\"Reassembly state for one direction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    next_seq: int | None = None  # next expected sequence number\r\n    emitted: bytearray = field(default_factory=bytearray)  # in-order bytes emitted so far\r\n    emitted_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]] = field(\r\n        default_factory=list\r\n    )  # (offset, ts) for first byte of segment\r\n    pending: list[tuple[int, bytes, float]] = field(\r\n        default_factory=list\r\n    )  # (seq, data, ts) not yet emitted\r\n    total_buffered: int = 0\r\n    max_bytes: int = 1 << 20  # 1 MB default\r\n    truncated: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def add_segment(self, seq: int, data: bytes, ts: float) -> None:\r\n        if self.truncated or not data:\r\n            return\r\n        if self.total_buffered + len(data) > self.max_bytes:\r\n            self.truncated = True\r\n            return\r\n        self.pending.append((seq, data, ts))\r\n        self.total_buffered += len(data)\r\n\r\n    def _ts_at_offset(self, offset: int) -> float | None:\r\n        \"\"\"Return approximate timestamp for byte at offset (from emitted_ts_map).\"\"\"\r\n        if not self.emitted_ts_map:\r\n            return None\r\n        best_ts = None\r\n        for o, t in self.emitted_ts_map:\r\n            if o <= offset:\r\n                best_ts = t\r\n        return best_ts\r\n\r\n    def get_reassembled(self) -> tuple[bytes, list[tuple[int, float]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Merge pending into emitted in order; return (full_bytes, ts_map).\"\"\"\r\n        if not self.pending:\r\n            return (bytes(self.emitted), list(self.emitted_ts_map))\r\n        self.pending.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0] & SEQ_MASK, x[0]))\r\n        out = bytearray(self.emitted)\r\n        ts_map = list(self.emitted_ts_map)\r\n        next_seq = self.next_seq\r\n        if next_seq is None and self.pending:\r\n            next_seq = self.pending[0][0]\r\n        i = 0\r\n        while i < len(self.pending):\r\n            seq, data, _ts = self.pending[i]\r\n            if next_seq is None:\r\n                next_seq = seq\r\n            start_out_len = len(out)\r\n            # segment [seq, seq+len)\r\n            end_seq = seq + len(data)\r\n            # Entire segment is before next_seq (duplicate/retrans) -> skip\r\n            if _seq_lt(end_seq, next_seq) or (end_seq == next_seq and _seq_lt(seq, next_seq)):\r\n                i += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            if _seq_lt(next_seq, seq):\r\n                # Gap: segment starts after next_seq\r\n                out.extend(data)\r\n                ts_map.append((start_out_len, _ts))\r\n                next_seq = end_seq\r\n                self.total_buffered -= len(data)\r\n                del self.pending[i]\r\n                continue\r\n            # Overlap: segment overlaps next_seq\r\n            offset = (next_seq - seq) & SEQ_MASK\r\n            if offset >= len(data):\r\n                # Segment entirely before next_seq (duplicate)\r\n                i += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            chunk = data[offset:]\r\n            out.extend(chunk)\r\n            ts_map.append((start_out_len, _ts))\r\n            next_seq = seq + len(data)\r\n            self.total_buffered -= len(data)\r\n            del self.pending[i]\r\n        self.emitted = out\r\n        self.next_seq = next_seq\r\n        self.emitted_ts_map = ts_map\r\n        return (bytes(out), ts_map)\r\n\r\n\r\nclass TCPReassembler:\r\n    \"\"\"Reassemble TCP streams per flow with bounded memory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(self, max_bytes_per_direction: int = 1 << 20) -> None:\r\n        self.max_bytes_per_direction = max_bytes_per_direction\r\n\r\n    def reassemble(\r\n        self,\r\n        segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]],\r\n    ) -> tuple[bytes, bytes, list[tuple[int, float]], list[tuple[int, float]], bool]:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Reassemble segments into client-to-server and server-to-client byte streams.\r\n        Returns (c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated).\r\n        ts_map: list of (byte_offset, timestamp) for first byte of each segment.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        c2s = _DirState(max_bytes=self.max_bytes_per_direction)\r\n        s2c = _DirState(max_bytes=self.max_bytes_per_direction)\r\n        for ts, payload, direction, seq in segments:\r\n            if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n                c2s.add_segment(seq, payload, ts)\r\n            else:\r\n                s2c.add_segment(seq, payload, ts)\r\n        c2s_bytes, c2s_ts_map = c2s.get_reassembled()\r\n        s2c_bytes, s2c_ts_map = s2c.get_reassembled()\r\n        truncated = c2s.truncated or s2c.truncated\r\n        return (c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated)\r\n"
        },

SYN from client (ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, ...)\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.0, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1000, 0x02))\r\n    # SYN-ACK from server\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.01, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"\", 2000, 0x12))\r\n    # ACK from client\r\n    list(tracker.ingest(1000.02, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1001, 0x10))\r\n    # Data client -> server (10 bytes)\r\n    out = list(\r\n        tracker.ingest(\r\n            1000.03, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"1234567890\", 1001, 0x18\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # Data server -> client (5 bytes) + FIN server\r\n    out = list(\r\n        tracker.ingest(1000.04, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, 6, b\"hello\", 2001, 0x11)\r\n    )\r\n    assert len(out) == 0\r\n    # FIN client\r\n    out = list(\r\n        tracker.ingest(1000.05, \"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80, 6, b\"\", 1011, 0x11)\r\n    )\r\n    assert len(out) == 1\r\n    flow, segments = out[0]\r\n    assert flow.bytes_client_to_server == 10\r\n    assert flow.bytes_server_to_client == 5\r\n    assert flow.client_ip == \"192.168.1.100\"\r\n    assert flow.server_ip == \"192.168.1.1\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "38a804b05aad71ac3118330aa653fa5617a5e6d4c64197f5820093510cdf63e8", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stable correlation IDs for flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport hashlib\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _canonical_endpoints(src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int) -> tuple[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically (ep = 'ip:port').\"\"\"\r\n    ep1 = f\"{src_ip}:{src_port}\"\r\n    ep2 = f\"{dst_ip}:{dst_port}\"\r\n    return (ep1, ep2) if ep1 <= ep2 else (ep2, ep1)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_flow_id(\r\n    src_ip: str,\r\n    src_port: int,\r\n    dst_ip: str,\r\n    dst_port: int,\r\n    protocol: int,\r\n    capture_file_id: str,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable hash of 5-tuple + capture file id. Deterministic across runs (same flow from either direction).\"\"\"\r\n    ep1, ep2 = _canonical_endpoints(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    canonical = f\"{ep1}|{ep2}|{protocol}|{capture_file_id}\"\r\n    return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id: str, transaction_index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/1.1: flow_id + sequential index.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_{transaction_index}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id: str, stream_id: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/2 or gRPC: flow_id + stream_id.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_s{stream_id}\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "19f6a1251a3e6132c1c7a5dc7106254e1927fbf562bf55c01d3fb8ccace21c8a", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/1.1 request/response parsing from reassembled plaintext streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport re\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP_METHODS = (\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"PATCH\", \"DELETE\", \"HEAD\", \"OPTIONS\", \"CONNECT\", \"TRACE\")\r\nHTTP1_RESPONSE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^HTTP/1\\.[01]\\s+(\\d{3})\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\nREQUEST_LINE_RE = re.compile(rb\"^([A-Z]+)\\s+([^\\s]+)\\s+HTTP/1\\.[01]\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_request_starts(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return byte offsets where HTTP requests start (method token).\"\"\"\r\n    starts = []\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(data):\r\n        for method in HTTP_METHODS:\r\n            m = method.encode()\r\n            if data[i : i + len(m)] == m and (i == 0 or data[i - 1 : i] in b\"\\r\\n\"):\r\n                starts.append(i)\r\n                break\r\n        i += 1\r\n    return starts\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _find_response_starts(data: bytes) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return list of (offset, status_code) for HTTP response starts.\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    for m in HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.finditer(data):\r\n        results.append((m.start(), int(m.group(1))))\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _header_value(data: bytes, name: str) -> str | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Get first header value (case-insensitive). data must be bytes.\"\"\"\r\n    prefix = (name + \":\").encode().lower()\r\n    start = data.lower().find(prefix)\r\n    if start == -1:\r\n        return None\r\n    end = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\", start)\r\n    if end == -1:\r\n        end = len(data)\r\n    line = data[start + len(prefix) : end].strip().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    return line\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _split_headers_body(data: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (headers_bytes, body_bytes) after first \\\\r\\\\n\\\\r\\\\n.\"\"\"\r\n    idx = data.find(b\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\")\r\n    if idx == -1:\r\n        return (data, b\"\")\r\n    return (data[:idx], data[idx + 4 :])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _body_length_from_headers(headers: bytes) -> int | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Content-Length if present.\"\"\"\r\n    v = _header_value(headers, \"Content-Length\")\r\n    if v is None:\r\n        return None\r\n    try:\r\n        return int(v)\r\n    except ValueError:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_chunked(body: bytes) -> bytes:\r\n    \"\"\"Best-effort chunked decode; return concatenated body.\"\"\"\r\n    out = bytearray()\r\n    i = 0\r\n    while i < len(body):\r\n        line_end = body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i)\r\n        if line_end == -1:\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            size = int(body[i:line_end].strip().split(b\";\")[0], 16)\r\n        except ValueError:\r\n            break\r\n        i = line_end + 2\r\n        if size == 0:\r\n            break\r\n        if i + size <= len(body):\r\n            out.extend(body[i : i + size])\r\n        i += size\r\n        if body.find(b\"\\r\\n\", i) == i:\r\n            i += 2\r\n    return bytes(out)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_request(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one request starting at start. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset) or None.\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    req_line = headers.split(b\"\\r\\n\")[0]\r\n    match = REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(req_line)\r\n    if not match:\r\n        return None\r\n    method = match.group(1).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    path = match.group(2).decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\r\n    host = _header_value(headers, \"Host\")\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        te = _header_value(headers, \"Transfer-Encoding\") or \"\"\r\n        if \"chunked\" in te.lower():\r\n            # consume chunked body best-effort\r\n            raw_body = body\r\n            body = _parse_chunked(raw_body)\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4 + len(raw_body)  # approximate\r\n        else:\r\n            end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return (\r\n        {\r\n            \"method\": method,\r\n            \"path\": path,\r\n            \"host\": host,\r\n            \"headers\": headers,\r\n            \"body\": body,\r\n            \"start\": start,\r\n            \"end\": end,\r\n        },\r\n        start,\r\n        end,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _consume_response(data: bytes, start: int) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], int, int] | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse one response. Return (parsed_dict, start, end_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    chunk = data[start:]\r\n    headers, body = _split_headers_body(chunk)\r\n    status_match = HTTP1_RESPONSE_RE.search(headers)\r\n    if not status_match:\r\n        return None\r\n    status_code = int(status_match.group(1))\r\n    cl = _body_length_from_headers(headers)\r\n    if cl is not None:\r\n        body_len = min(cl, len(body))\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4 + body_len\r\n    else:\r\n        end = start + len(headers) + 4\r\n    return (\r\n        {\"status_code\": status_code, \"headers\": headers, \"body\": body, \"start\": start, \"end\": end},\r\n        start,\r\n        end,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP1Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/1.1 request/response pairs from plaintext reassembled streams.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http1\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if not c2s_bytes and not s2c_bytes:\r\n            return False\r\n        data = c2s_bytes[:200] if c2s_bytes else s2c_bytes[:200]\r\n        if REQUEST_LINE_RE.match(data.lstrip()) or b\"HTTP/1.\" in data[:20]:\r\n            return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        req_starts = _find_request_starts(c2s_bytes)\r\n        resp_starts = _find_response_starts(s2c_bytes)\r\n        if not req_starts:\r\n            return []\r\n        req_idx = 0\r\n        resp_idx = 0\r\n        txn_index = 0\r\n        while req_idx < len(req_starts):\r\n            req_start = req_starts[req_idx]\r\n            result = _consume_request(c2s_bytes, req_start)\r\n            if not result:\r\n                req_idx += 1\r\n                continue\r\n            req_info, _r0, req_end = result\r\n            # Pair with next response\r\n            resp_start_offset = 0\r\n            resp_end_offset = 0\r\n            status_code = None\r\n            resp_result = None\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_start_offset, status_code = resp_starts[resp_idx]\r\n                resp_result = _consume_response(s2c_bytes, resp_start_offset)\r\n                if resp_result:\r\n                    _, _s0, resp_end_offset = resp_result\r\n                else:\r\n                    resp_end_offset = resp_start_offset\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_start, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = (\r\n                ts_at_offset(resp_start_offset, s2c_ts_map) if resp_idx < len(resp_starts) else None\r\n            )\r\n            end_ts = response_ts\r\n            if resp_result:\r\n                _, _, re = resp_result\r\n                end_ts = ts_at_offset(re, s2c_ts_map) or end_ts\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            request_bytes = req_end - req_start\r\n            response_bytes = (resp_end_offset - resp_start_offset) if resp_result else 0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id, txn_index)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http1\",\r\n                    method=req_info.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req_info.get(\"host\"),\r\n                    path=req_info.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=status_code,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=end_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=request_bytes,\r\n                    response_bytes=response_bytes,\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            txn_index += 1\r\n            req_idx += 1\r\n            if resp_idx < len(resp_starts):\r\n                resp_idx += 1\r\n        return transactions\r\n"}, "2:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/2 frame parsing and stream extraction using hyperframe and hpack.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nimport hpack\r\nfrom hyperframe.frame import Frame\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\nPREFACE_LEN = 24\r\nFRAME_HEADERS = 1\r\nFRAME_DATA = 0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_frames(data: bytes, base_offset: int = 0) -> list[tuple[int, int, Any, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 frames. Returns list of (stream_id, frame_type, frame_obj, byte_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 9 <= len(data):\r\n        try:\r\n            frame, length = Frame.parse_frame_header(data[offset : offset + 9])\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            break\r\n        if length > 0 and offset + 9 + length > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n        payload = data[offset + 9 : offset + 9 + length] if length > 0 else b\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            frame.parse_body(memoryview(payload))\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            offset += 9 + length\r\n            continue\r\n        stream_id = getattr(frame, \"stream_id\", 0)\r\n        results.append((stream_id, frame.type, frame, base_offset + offset))\r\n        offset += 9 + length\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _headers_to_dict(headers: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    return {k.lower(): v for k, v in headers}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _decode_header_block(block: bytes) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"HPACK-decode header block. Try with optional padding byte skip.\"\"\"\r\n    for start in (0, 1, 5, 6):\r\n        if start >= len(block):\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            decoder = hpack.Decoder()\r\n            headers = decoder.decode(block[start:])\r\n            return _headers_to_dict(headers)\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            continue\r\n    return {}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP2Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 streams from plaintext reassembled bytes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http2\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        return c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] == HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                if \":method\" in headers or \"method\" in headers:\r\n                    request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                        \"offset\": offset,\r\n                        \"method\": headers.get(\":method\") or headers.get(\"method\"),\r\n                        \"path\": headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\"),\r\n                        \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\") or headers.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                if \":status\" in headers or \"status\" in headers:\r\n                    try:\r\n                        response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": offset,\r\n                            \"status_code\": int(\r\n                                headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\")\r\n                            ),\r\n                        }\r\n                    except ValueError:\r\n                        pass\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http2\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n"}, "2:LEN":
